uses: Cimicifuga racemosa suppository is used to alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings, while also providing relief from menstrual cramps and other premenstrual symptoms. The active compounds in Cimicifuga racemosa, such as actein and 23-deacetylisovaleryl-23-acetate, are believed to have a positive effect on the body's hormonal balance. It may also have a relaxing effect on the muscles, reducing anxiety and promoting better sleep.

side_effects: Cimicifuga racemosa suppository can have side effects such as dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to the potential estrogen-like effects of the black cohosh extract. Some individuals may experience vaginal bleeding or spotting as a result of using this suppository. In rare cases, cimicifuga racemosa suppository may also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications.
